tagline: Building innovative applications and AI-powered solutions for real-world impact.
description: Full-Stack Developer and AI Enthusiast passionate about creating impactful digital experiences and solving real-world problems through technology.

roles.detailed: Full-Stack Developer | AI Enthusiast | Problem Solver

bio: Hi, I'm Sachi Jha — a Full-Stack Developer and AI Enthusiast. I am passionate about building innovative applications, exploring emerging technologies, and transforming ideas into impactful projects. Through hackathons, research, and continuous learning, I strive to create technology that solves real-world challenges and improves lives.

bullets: Building web and mobile applications using modern technologies.
Participating in hackathons and developing real-world solutions.
Learning full-stack development and AI technologies.
Working on research and innovative technology projects.
experience.desc: Focused on web development, full-stack technologies, AI projects, and research.

projects.title: Inventory & Supply Chain Tracker
projects.subtitle: Smart Business Management Platform
projects.desc: A real-time inventory and supply chain management platform designed for small businesses. Features live stock monitoring, low-stock alerts, role-based access control, sales analytics dashboards, supplier management, and real-time inventory updates using Socket.io. Helps businesses reduce stockouts, improve inventory visibility, and make data-driven decisions.

publications.title: Control-M Log Analyzer
publications.desc: An AI-powered log analysis prototype for Control-M support, using LLM workflows to detect likely root causes and generate troubleshooting guidance.
